fields.panel1_caption: renting Nvidia GPUs to run your model
fields.panel2_caption: building your own chip to ditch Nvidia
fields.panel4_caption: having your AI design the silicon it will run on

narrative_summary: The escalation from renting Nvidia chips up to OpenAI's recursive move of letting its own models design the Jalapeño chip they'll then run on.
rationale: Candidate 4 has the best escalation rhythm for the galaxy-brain template, and the 'naming it Jalapeño for some reason' beat breaks the pattern before the recursive kicker lands harder than the straight-faced restatements in 2 and 3.
story_title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
place: at a robot-staffed restaurant where the kitchen is actively on fire
hat_pair: foam speech bubble hat with the word 'typing...' displayed on it
chef's toque overflowing with tangled plastic noodles
